name: Red Soaked Fresh Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all the fruits and partially crush them with the back of a spoon to release some juices. Sprinkle with kirsch. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Prepare the cake by lining a round, 3-quart mold with plastic wrap.
3. Line the mold again with half-inch slices of cake, pressing them to take the shape of the mold.
4. Fill the cake-lined mold with the refrigerated fruits and cover with more slices of cake.
5. Press down with a weight (such as a heavy plate) and refrigerate for 24 hours or overnight.
6. Unmold the cake with the help of plastic wrap or by running a sharp knife around the edge, turning out onto a serving plate.
7. Decorate with whipped cream, strawberry sauce, and mint leaves.
8. To prepare the strawberry sauce: In a blender, process the berries and mineral water until pureed. Refrigerate.
